description: Search Tip: So you don't have to scroll through pages of addresses on your state page, do this: With Windows, press Control, letter F, with Mac press Command, letter F, then type in your city, zip code, or other search criteria, such as esq. for an attorney. Try zip codes for other nearby towns. Those listings containing an asterisk (*) have sponsored a Wrightslaw conference.

name: Autism Center of Nebraska
city: Autism Center of Nebraska DeAnna Taylor 4007 Harrison Street Omaha
description: Autism Center of Nebraska DeAnna Taylor 4007 Harrison Street Omaha, NE 68147 (402) 320-5128; (402) 884-7336; (402) 932-0793 (fax) Email: deannataylor | at | autismcenterofnebraska.org Web: http://autismcenterofnebraska.org The Autism Center of Nebraska offers: In Home, Residential, Respite and Vocational services for perrsons with developmental disabilities, support group for parents and family members that deal with Autism. name: Voice Advocacy Center
city: Voice Advocacy Center Clarice Jackson 6655 Sorenson Pkwy Omaha
description: Voice Advocacy Center Clarice Jackson 6655 Sorenson Pkwy Omaha, NE 68152 (402) 431-2574 Email: voiceadvocacycenter | at | gmail.com Web: http://facebook.com/voiceadvocacycenter Voice Advocacy Center is a dyslexia screening, tutoring and special education advocacy program for children, youth and adults who are below grade level academically in reading, writing and spelling due to dyslexia and children who receive special education services in school who are in need of an advocate to ensure they are receiving an “appropriate” education.
